Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x1497 "ZALAGA-1497" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Zalaga (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: The following modifications were made: 1. Patched the JMP $166B instruction at $3395 to be JMP $C400 instead. 2. Added a small routine at $C400 to set $9B to $FF so that the game defaults to joystick. 3. The routine then sets the on-screen control display from the K1 (keyboard) to J1 (joytstick) by setting 16 bytes of data in the bitmap at $BF28. 4. The routine then finally jumps to $166B to carry on the normal code flow.
